vocab.example: Advanced Calculus presented a significant intellectual hurdle that I struggled to overcome during my freshman year.
Theoretical Physics is daunting because it deals almost exclusively with abstract concepts rather than tangible reality.

vocab.meaning: một quá trình học hỏi khó khăn lúc ban đầu
vocab.example: Software Engineering has a steep learning curve, requiring months of practice before one can write functional code.

vocab.meaning: một viễn cảnh đáng ngại/làm nản lòng
vocab.example: The idea of memorizing the entire periodic table was a daunting prospect for me in high school.

vocab.meaning: bản chất gây bối rối/khó hiểu
vocab.example: The perplexing nature of organic chemistry reactions often left me feeling completely lost during lab sessions.

vocab.meaning: nắm vững những chi tiết phức tạp
vocab.example: It takes years to master the intricacies of international law due to its constant evolution.

vocab.meaning: sự căng thẳng về nhận thức
vocab.example: Studying formal logic puts an immense cognitive strain on me, as it requires absolute precision in thought.

vocab.meaning: sự hiểu biết thấu đáo và tinh tế
vocab.example: Developing a nuanced understanding of classical literature is difficult when you aren't familiar with the historical context.

vocab.meaning: vượt quá tầm hiểu biết của ai đó
vocab.example: Whenever the professor discussed statistical modeling, I felt like I was completely out of my depth.

vocab.meaning: trở ngại về tâm lý (gây khó khăn khi suy nghĩ/học)
vocab.example: I’ve always had a mental block when it comes to learning foreign languages, despite my best efforts.
